creator: bsdbugs@staktrace.com
text:
Created attachment 212571
Update s3backer to 1.5.4

This updates sysutils/fusefs-backer from v1.5.0 to v1.5.4, the latest released version. This is my first time updating a port, please let me know if I need to do anything else. Thanks!

The new release contains mostly bugfixes from the previous version, nothing really worth calling out.
